user.title: KNMI UV Index
user.description: Enter your KNMI Data Platform API key. Request a free key at the [KNMI developer portal]({register_url}) (choose the Open Data API).

location.title: Choose a location
location.description: Pick the location to report the UV index for. The list is based on your Home Assistant zones.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the KNMI Data Platform
error.no_zones: No zones found and no Home location is configured

init.title: KNMI UV Index options
init.description: Change how often the data is refreshed and which location is used.
